title: canna orientalis
intro: Canna orientalis, also known as the Indian shot or Canna, is a perennial plant native to Asia and Australia, characterized by its bright flowers and edible seeds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Canna orientalis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the seeds and roots of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and capsules, while the rhizomes can be used to make a medicinal oil.
